Okay dudes, so second video. This little image here is like so important. So most of the people that I talk to in the gym industry have a core offer. They have this offer right here. And that's it. They're like, I do this. And that's cool. And if you want to do that, you have to make sure it's working this way. But you know how to make this whole money thing, money pipeline work way, way better? Is to have multiple things. Okay. Now, what I want to be really clear about is that I don't want you to start distracting yourself trying to start a nutrition program and food program when this isn't done yet. Okay. Like this is really important. Until your core offers full and is tight, don't move on to the next thing, right? Like the reason that we do gym launch before we do high ticket gym launch is because I can't have you offer a semi private training session if your bootcamp has to be tight. Now, it doesn't mean you stop. You stop marketing this. You're still going to keep marketing it. But that's where, like that's why you need to have inflows at each one of these things. Okay. And the thing is, is whatever that bait is, all of this is moving to one center point. So I'll give you the example with click funnels, right? Like click funnels, click funnels is their core offer. But then they have, they have fill your funnel, they have, you know, certified partners, which is a $10,000 programs fill your funnel is a $4,000 program. They have intercircle, which is $25,000 or $30,000, whatever it is now. And then they have like, so there's all these different silos that they're, they have funnel hacks, which is $1,000. So like all these things, but it's all around this core continuity. And with the gym, you have this continuity, which is going to be your core offer, which is like your bootcamp or your CrossFit or whatever, right? But once someone is in there, you need to have some ascension for them. Okay. And that's where your high ticket program comes in, which is in like, mind you, when you have, when you have different level offers, you want them to be different. All right. So it's not like you don't want to have like a hundred dollar offer and then like another one that's like for an extra $25 a month, like that's not going to make you any more money. Okay. Promise you anyone who's doing it already knows you're not making more money from doing that. All right. It needs to be significantly different in value and in price. Okay. So if this is like a hundred bucks a month or a hundred to 200, whatever, this one needs to be like 400 plus. Okay. It has to be like two to three times as expensive, like way more expensive. So it's a different level of service. Okay. So that's how your high ticket offer. Okay. After that, if you want to have a further ascension, you can have retreats. Okay. Retreats are here. You're looking at multiple thousand dollars. You're looking at like three, three to four K is what you're looking at here in terms of pricing. Okay. Three K to four K. All right. And that's for like a week retreat. And so for there, if you have 200 customers, like the likelihood is that you'll be able to find like four or five and you can play with this price. You know your market better. But I mean, I wouldn't really want to do it for less than three, you know, and ideally you want to get like five, six, seven people and you can do 20,000. And then a week and go on a vacation. All right. And it's cool because it's, you know, all these pictures will get a lot of collateral that you can then use to market the next one. Okay. So these are the three levels that you can do. Obviously you can put one on one PT in here somewhere as well. But I just want you to, I just want to illustrate the concept. Okay. But all these people are on a continuity so that they stay in your world. Okay. And then from there, you need to have these bridges built. Okay. So if you'd like just having that service doesn't do anything, they have to be communicated to them. So like for those of you who are watching this, right?
